pages.title: Yggdrasil
pages.text: Connect both the +Y and -Y build limits with your tree. You can be one or two blocks off the lower build limit, but try to be as close as possible, and it must touch bedrock.

pages.title: Reward
pages.text: Gain an ashen sapling. It counts as a descendant of your heart log. You still cannot absorb other ashen trees. (Craft them into planks to avoid accidental placement)
